skills.description: Lybic Sandbox is a cloud sandbox built for agents and automation workflows. Think of it as a disposable cloud computer you can spin up on demand. Agents can perform GUI actions like seeing the screen, clicking, typing, and handling pop ups, which makes it a great fit for legacy apps and complex flows where APIs are missing or incomplete. It is designed for control and observability. You can monitor execution in real time, stop it when needed, and use logs and replay to debug, reproduce runs, and evaluate reliability. For long running tasks, iterative experimentation, or sensitive environments, sandboxed execution helps reduce risk and operational overhead.
skills.description_zh: Lybic Sandbox 是一款专为智能体和自动化工作流打造的云沙箱。可将其视为按需启用的临时云电脑。智能体可执行图形界面操作，如查看屏幕、点击、输入和处理弹窗，非常适合缺乏或不完整 API 的遗留应用和复杂流程。该沙箱注重可控性和可观测性，支持实时监控执行状态、必要时停止运行，并可通过日志和回放进行调试、重现运行和评估可靠性。对于长时间运行任务、迭代实验或敏感环境，沙箱化执行有助于降低风险和运营开销。
skills.name: Lybic Sandbox
